defaultProvider.description: The AI provider to use for agent invocations

defaultModel.description: The model identifier to use (must be non-empty)

defaultThinkingLevel.description: The thinking level to pass to the agent

trustPolicy.description: Trust-level gating policy for controlling agent capabilities per actor

trustedUsers.description: GitHub usernames that receive full (trusted) agent capabilities

semiTrustedRoles.description: GitHub permission levels that receive semi-trusted (read-only) agent capabilities

untrustedBehavior.description: How to handle untrusted actors: respond with a read-only explanation or block entirely

limits.description: Cost and resource boundaries for agent runs

maxTokensPerRun.description: Maximum total tokens (input + output) allowed per agent run

maxToolCallsPerRun.description: Maximum number of tool calls allowed per agent run

workflowTimeoutMinutes.description: Hard time boundary in minutes for the agent workflow (GitHub Actions max: 360)

compaction.description: Context compaction settings for long conversations. Prevents context window exhaustion by summarizing older messages when the context grows too large.

enabled.description: Whether automatic context compaction is enabled

reserveTokens.description: Number of tokens to reserve for the model's response after compaction

keepRecentTokens.description: Number of recent tokens to preserve verbatim during compaction. Higher values keep more recent context but compact more aggressively for older messages.

retry.description: Automatic retry settings for transient LLM API errors. Reduces hard failures from rate-limit spikes and server errors in CI environments.

enabled.description: Whether automatic retry with exponential backoff is enabled

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts before failing

baseDelayMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds for the first retry (doubles with each subsequent retry)

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum delay in milliseconds between retries (caps exponential backoff)
